dates.summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, a new speech model designed for real-time conversational AI with full-duplex interaction, interference suppression, and more natural turn-taking. Meta also acquired humanoid robotics startup Assured Robot Intelligence to strengthen its robot AI stack, while AWS launched new AWS Transform automation to move BI workloads into Amazon Quick in days rather than traditional multi-month migrations.
